keywords.func:
Function declaration.

`func name |a: int, b: int| { return a + b; }`
keywords.for: Iterator loop. Supports array and object iteration.
keywords.try: Try block for runtime error handling.
keywords.catch: Catch block. Captures error variable with `|e|`.
keywords.use: Import a standard library module or selected module members.
keywords.include: Include exported values from another `.zk` source file.
keywords.export: Export values from current file for `include` consumers.
keywords.from: Used by `use { ... } from module` and `include { ... } from "file.zk"`.

builtins.println:
Built-in print function.

Supports interpolation placeholders:
- positional: `"{}"`
- named: `"{name}"`

modules.math:
Standard math module.

Most functions accept `numeric` (int | float).
Import with `use math;`
modules.fs:
Filesystem module.

Paths are strings. Most operations throw runtime errors on failure.
Import with `use fs;`
modules.os:
Operating system/environment module.

Command execution can be disabled via `ZEKKEN_DISABLE_SHELL=1`.
Import with `use os;`
modules.path:
Path utilities module.

Cross-platform helpers for joining and normalizing path strings.
Import with `use path;`
modules.encoding:
Encoding utilities module.

Encode/decode helpers for base64/hex/url.
Import with `use encoding;`
modules.http:
HTTP client/server module.

Disabled on WASM. Disable on native with `ZEKKEN_DISABLE_HTTP=1`.
Import with `use http;`

Exponentiation.

Base is optional (call with 1 or 2 args).

module_members.request:
http.request => |method: string, url: string, headers: obj, body: any, timeout_ms: int| -> obj

Optional: headers, body, timeout_ms. Returns `{url, status, ok, headers, body}`.
module_members.get:
http.get => |url: string, headers: obj, timeout_ms: int| -> obj

Optional: headers, timeout_ms.
module_members.post:
http.post => |url: string, body: any, headers: obj, timeout_ms: int| -> obj

Optional: body, headers, timeout_ms.
module_members.get_json:
http.get_json => |url: string, headers: obj, timeout_ms: int| -> any

Optional: headers, timeout_ms. GET request that parses JSON response body.
module_members.build_query:
http.build_query => |params: obj| -> string

Builds a URL query string from an object. Values are stringified then percent-encoded.
module_members.parse_query:
http.parse_query => |qs: string| -> obj

Parses a query string into an object of strings.
module_members.serve:
http.serve => |addr: string, routes: obj| -> void

Starts a simple HTTP server for static routes. Route keys can be `"/path"` or `"METHOD /path"`. Use `"__default__"` for fallback.
module_members.listen:
http.listen => |addr: string| -> obj

Creates a server object with methods: `accept(timeout_ms: int)`, `respond(id: int, resp: any)`, `addr()`.

methods.format: Pretty multi-line formatting method (returns a string).
methods.first: Returns first element in an array.
methods.last: Returns last element in an array.
methods.shift: Removes and returns first element from array.
methods.unshift: Inserts an element at the start of array.
methods.enqueue: Queue method: add value to the back of queue.
methods.dequeue: Queue method: remove and return value from the front of queue.
methods.peek: Queue method: return front value without removing it.
methods.is_empty: Queue method: returns `true` when queue is empty.
methods.clear: Queue method: removes all items from queue.
methods.join: Joins array elements with delimiter string.
methods.trim: Trims whitespace from both ends of string.
methods.toUpper: Returns an uppercase copy of a string.
methods.toLower: Returns a lowercase copy of a string.
methods.hasKey: Checks whether object contains a key.
methods.round: Rounds a float to the nearest int.
methods.floor: Rounds a float down to an int.
methods.ceil: Rounds a float up to an int.
methods.isEven: Returns `true` if a number is even.
methods.isOdd: Returns `true` if a number is odd.

operators.->:
Lambda declaration operator.

`let f: fn -> |x: int| { ... };`
operators.|: Parameter/argument delimiter in declarations and call blocks.
